ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., COVID-19, influenza) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_classification" TEXT /* Transmission classification of the disease (e.g., Community transmission, Clusters of cases) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases code */,
  "first_identified_date" TEXT /* Date when the disease was first identified */,
  "vaccination_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if a vaccine is available for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "who_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WHO region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the WHO region (e.g., Americas, South-East Asia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WHO region */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the WHO region's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United States of America, India) */,
  "who_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WHO region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "healthcare_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on healthcare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_who_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("who_region_id") REFERENCES who_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., New York, Maharashtra) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district (e.g., New York City, Mumbai) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the case belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the case was reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of cases reported for the disease */,
  "cumulative_total_per_100000" REAL /* Cumulative total of cases per 100000 population for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported in the last 7 days for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_7_days_per_100000" REAL /* Number of new cases per 100000 population reported in the last 7 days for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_24_hours" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported in the last 24 hours for the disease */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the reported cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the reported cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the death belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the death was reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the death was reported */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths reported for the disease */,
  "cumulative_total_per_100000" REAL /* Cumulative total of deaths per 100000 population for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported in the last 7 days for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_7_days_per_100000" REAL /* Number of new deaths per 100000 population reported in the last 7 days for the disease */,
  "newly_reported_last_24_hours" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported in the last 24 hours for the disease */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the reported deaths */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the reported deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
